effect.subject: callout_style
effect.reserved_for: one instance per screen/section — never two of the same style competing

rule_text: There are three approved callout styles; use them judiciously. Never place two callouts of the same style competing on one screen/section.
intent: Preserve visual hierarchy and prevent redundant callout treatments.
summary: Use three approved callout styles judiciously; never place two callouts of the same style competing on one screen or section.
